understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game was to maneuver pushable objects and/or selectable pieces onto goal tiles marked with + in the semantic grid or otherwise satisfy the success condition identified as WIN for each level, completing all levels in sequence.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement was performed in four cardinal directions by moving the currently selected piece by one cell's worth of pixels (3 pixels per cell). Pushable objects could be pushed if adjacent in the intended direction and space allowed. Walls (#) could block or limit movement and pushing, and their properties were learned through interaction. Multiple selectable pieces existed; control could be switched between them using CLICK with the pixel coordinates matching those reported in the game state.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game was to maneuver pushable objects and/or selectable pieces onto goal tiles marked with + in the semantic grid or otherwise satisfy the success condition identified as WIN for each level, completing all levels in sequence.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement was performed in four cardinal directions by moving the currently selected piece by one cell's worth of pixels (3 pixels per cell). Pushable objects could be pushed if adjacent in the intended direction and space allowed. Walls (#) could block or limit movement and pushing, and their properties were learned through interaction. Multiple selectable pieces existed; control could be switched between them using CLICK with the pixel coordinates matching those reported in the game state.
